example_requirement: Each item in datasets Must be one of: Inline Data Information.
Property names of interest to the general public are encouraged to be registered in the CycloneDX Property Taxonomy.
The modified property is Optional and Deprecated.
Each item of the notes array must be a Note object.
SBOMs should ideally contain all direct and transitive components and the dependency relationships between them.
Every BOM generated should have a unique serial number, even if the contents of the BOM have not changed over time.
It is recommended to leverage compositions to indicate unknown dependency graphs.
A consumer must interpret and process the contents of CycloneDX BOMs in a manner conforming to this standard.
All items in the nested components list must be unique.
